title: Automation for turning an automation on and off
excerpt:

posts.author: ptroy (Preston)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an automation that runs great, but I only want it to run 2 days a week.

Currently I have to to manually turn the automation on and off each day that I want to use it and remember to turn it on and off when I don’t.

The current date conditions don’t allow me to test what day today is and then only run if it matches.

I would love to include it all in 1 automation, but my second thought is if there’s a date based automation that can turn the other automation on.

If anyone knows anyways to do this now, greatly appreciated.
